title: The Giants Join the Breakthrough
description: Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Enies Lobby guard, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's a mortar! Dodge it, GOMORRAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This central road is bad news....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Well, there was something important I forgot...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: So much was going on before.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I'll tell you quickly, so listen well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I was going to ask about it.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Granny, how'd you know something like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Oimo
dialogue.text: Why are you angry at me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hello--!? Can you hear me, pirate Lady--!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Now we know where to go....!!

summary: Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.
